name: Sion
title: The Undead Champion
shortBio:
- The Abilities are completely different. Read the descriptions
- Sion has Ability Power and Attack Damage builds
- Damage dealer not a Juggernaut

skins.name: Lumberjack Sion
skins.description: He's a lumberjack, and he's okay.

skins.name: Mecha Zero Sion
skins.description: The ultimate ground-based mecha unit, 0-SION becomes like a freight train once given a combat directive, and will literally stop at nothing to dismantle an opponent—no matter how much damage it takes. There are lingering concerns that it could go rogue, but so far these worries have been unfounded.

skins.name: Blackfrost Sion

chromas.name: Blackfrost Sion (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2021.

skins.description: A fearsome jötunn who once stood at the front of Lissandra's vast armies, Sion fell in battle only for his master's magic to weave itself beneath his massive frame, resurrecting him as a monster of rage and cold.

skins.name: High Noon Sion

chromas.name: High Noon Sion (Ruby)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a bundle exclusive in 2022.

chromas.name: High Noon Sion (Nomad)

descriptions.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the MSI 2022 High Noon event.

chromas.description: This chroma was released as a Loot exclusive in the MSI 2022 High Noon event.

skins.description: As soon as Sion knew life, he knew rage: rage that ripped the restraints from the operating table; rage that crushed the bones of those men who tried to play at the miracle of Creation; rage that he ain't, nor ever would be, the second clockwork angel they had hoped to construct. Sion knows rage, and so will the world.

skins.name: Classic Sion
skins.description: Infinitely scaling lifesteal juggernaut? How about... terrifying assassin that could cryptically gaze for days? Get yourself an undead champion that can do both. An original 40 champ, Sion was a Season 1 pick able to ADAPt to any situtation, full-healthing squishies with an unmissable combo. At least he couldn't come back from the dead. That'd be crazy.

passive.name: Feel No Pain
passive.description: Sion has a 40% chance to ignore up to 30/40/50 damage each time he is attacked.

spells.name: Cryptic Gaze
spells.description: Sion's stare terrifies a single enemy, dealing damage and stunning them.
spells.dynamicDescription: <mainText>Blasts a single enemy, dealing <magicDamage>@TotalDamage@ magic damage</magicDamage> and <status>Stunning</status> for 1.5 seconds.

spells.name: Death's Caress
spells.description: Sion surrounds himself with a damage-absorbing shield.  If the shield is not destroyed in 10 seconds then it will explode, dealing damage to surrounding enemies. Cast again after 4 seconds to manually detonate.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Sion surrounds himself with a shield which absorbs @TotalShield@ damage. If the shield is not destroyed in 10 seconds, it will explode, dealing @TotalDamage@ magic damage to surrounding enemies.

Recast after 4 seconds to manually detonate.

spells.name: Enrage
spells.description: While active Sion gains Attack Damage at the cost of Health on each basic attack. Additonally, he permanently increases his maximum Health whenever he kills a unit.
spells.dynamicDescription:
Toggle: Sion's Attack Damage is increased by @BonusDamage@ and he permanently gains @HPGainReduced@ maximum Health per kill. This bonus is doubled against Champions, large minions and large monsters

Total Health gained: +@f1@@SpellModifierDescriptionAppend@

spells.name: Cannibalism
spells.description: Sion consumes some of his enemies' life force on each attack, leeching health to himself and nearby allies. The smell of flesh also renews Sion's fervor, increasing his Attack Speed.
spells.dynamicDescription: <mainText>Grants Sion <lifeSteal>@LifestealPercent*100@% Lifesteal</lifeSteal> and <attackSpeed>@AttackSpeedMod*100@% Attack Speed</attackSpeed> for 20 seconds. Additionally, Sion's basic attacks <healing>heal</healing> surrounding allies for @HealPercent*100@% of the damage dealt.
